item.title:
🚀 Asana 新手必看：打造不亂套的數位辦公室
很多企業導入 Asana 後覺得難用，通常不是工具的問題，而是「基礎架構」出了錯 。在 2026 年，好的設定能省下超過 40% 的溝通成本 。
...
item.description: 🚀 Asana 新手必看：打造不亂套的數位辦公室 很多企業導入 Asana 後覺得難用，通常不是工具的問題，而是「基礎架構」出了錯 。在 2026 年，好的設定能省下超過 40% 的溝通成本 。 給新手的 3 步驟全攻略： 1️⃣ 結構化分類：遵循「Team > Project > Task」邏輯 。像整理抽屜一樣，利用「智慧資料夾」保持工作空間整潔 。 2️⃣ 定義數據化欄位：設定優先級、任務來源與時數 。這不只是為了整潔，更是驅動 AI 自動分析的基礎 。 3️⃣ 視圖配置：執行者看「清單」、PM 看「甘特圖」、主管看「儀表板」 。找到團隊的「數位安全感」，讓正確的人看到正確的資訊 。 💡 關鍵點： 成功的設定是建立一個能讓 AI 運作的「優質數據庫」 。 想從零正確設定 Asana？歡迎聯絡思想科技專業顧問！ https://hubs.la/Q045RckJ0 hashtag #Asana hashtag #專案管理 hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #工作效率 hashtag #思想科技

item.description: 🚀 Stop the "Busy Work" with Google Workspace Studio We’ve all wished for a clone of ourselves to handle repetitive tasks like sorting emails or scheduling meetings. Google has made that a reality with Google Workspace Studio! 🤖 No Code: Build custom AI agents using quick templates or natural language. 🔗 Deep Integration: Agents live inside your Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs). 🧠 Agentic AI: Powered by Gemini 3 to reason through complex problems. 🏢 Available Now: Rolling out for Business and Enterprise editions. As a Google Cloud Premier Partner, Master Concept is here to help you build secure, high-ROI workflows. 📖 Read the blog: https://hubs.la/Q04567f20 👉 See it in action: https://hubs.la/Q04569zF0 hashtag #GoogleWorkspace hashtag #GoogleAI hashtag #Gemini3 hashtag #AgenticAI hashtag #WorkflowAutomation

item.description: 📌 2026 客服轉型：別讓「數據斷層」擋住你的成長路！ AI 客服不只是對話框，而是要具備「企業大腦」。 思想科技解析 2026 三大產業轉型實戰： 🚀 服務業｜訂單零流失 解決旺季回覆延遲！AI 自動導購與語音分流，處理 80% 常見問題，確保商機不漏接。 ⚙️ 製造業｜技術零斷層 數位導師上線！AI 知識庫取代紙本手冊，新進員工操作平板即可掌握 SOP，師傅經驗完美傳承。 🚚 運輸業｜隱私零風險 API 定位地圖打破資訊黑盒；「專屬門號 App」保障司機隱私，通話紀錄全數位化加密留存，符合合規標準。 🚀 您的團隊是否也正為了繁雜的客訴與數據斷層感到困擾？ 數位客服轉型不只是安裝工具，更是流程再造。 歡迎聯絡思想科技 Master Concept 專業顧問，讓我們為您打造高效、透明的 AI 客服體系，搶佔 2026 轉型先機！ 閱讀全文 👉 https://hubs.la/Q0424lrT0 hashtag #思想科技 hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #AI客服大腦 hashtag #客服轉型 hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #2026趨勢 hashtag #自動化服務

item.title: 📧 企業 IT 管理員們，還在為員工反映「漏信」或「郵件延遲」而頭痛嗎？😩 其實，Google Workspace 內建的電子郵件記錄搜尋 (Email Log Search, 簡稱 ELS) 就是您...
item.description: 📧 企業 IT 管理員們，還在為員工反映「漏信」或「郵件延遲」而頭痛嗎？😩 其實，Google Workspace 內建的電子郵件記錄搜尋 (Email Log Search, 簡稱 ELS) 就是您的最佳救星！ELS 可以幫助您輕鬆查詢所有郵件動向，全方位掌控傳輸細節。 💡 ELS 能為企業帶來哪些優勢？ 1. 精準追蹤郵件動向：確認郵件是成功傳送、延遲，還是被誤判為垃圾郵件 2. 深度分析與疑難排解：查看中繼資料與傳輸路徑，找出信件未達的原因 3. 強化安全與合規審查：輕鬆識別異常郵件流，防範潛在攻擊與內部濫用 4. 一鍵匯出數據分析：支援多維度條件篩選，方便與資安團隊無縫協作 只需簡單 4 個步驟，就能大幅提升郵件管理效率，告別「信件失蹤」的懸案！ 🔗 點擊下方連結閱讀全文 https://hubs.la/Q044B4hJ0 hashtag #GoogleWorkspace hashtag #Gmail hashtag #EmailLogSearch hashtag #ELS

item.title:
2026 戰略佈局：別讓年度目標只停留在 PPT 裡 🚀
一月過了一半，您的 OKR 是否已從高層願景轉化為團隊的具體行動？ 在 2026 年，領先團隊不再依賴手動追蹤，而是透過 Asana AI ...
item.description: 2026 戰略佈局：別讓年度目標只停留在 PPT 裡 🚀 一月過了一半，您的 OKR 是否已從高層願景轉化為團隊的具體行動？ 在 2026 年，領先團隊不再依賴手動追蹤，而是透過 Asana AI 實現個人目標與組織戰略的「深度校準」。 以下是運用 Asana AI 提升計畫落地率的三個關鍵指令： ✅ 目標自動精煉：輸入「將目標轉化為符合 SMART 原則的 OKR」，AI 能自動將籠統文字轉化為數據驅動的關鍵成果（Key Results）。 ✅ 專案智慧拆解：透過 AI 生成執行清單，30 秒內產出第一季的核心任務骨架，大幅縮短腦力激盪的耗時。 ✅ 進度自動連動：利用 AI 偵測任務相依性衝突，當任務完成時，目標進度條同步更新，實現透明化管理。 💡 觀點： AI 的價值在於完成 60 分的繁瑣基礎，讓管理者的精力專注於剩下的 40 分——即關鍵決策與戰略微調。 別讓日常雜事掩蓋了長遠目標，讓 Asana 成為您的戰略副駕駛。 👉 完整實戰分享：https://hubs.la/Q0424cRg0 hashtag #AsanaAI hashtag #OKR hashtag #年度計畫 hashtag #專案管理 hashtag #SMART原則 hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #領導力 hashtag #效率管理

item.title:
2026 戰略佈局：別讓年度目標只停留在 PPT 裡！🎯
一月進入關鍵的「營運校準期」 。您的年度方針是否已從高層願景，轉化為團隊具體的行動清單？在 2026 年，領先團隊不再依賴手動追蹤，而是透過...
item.description: 2026 戰略佈局：別讓年度目標只停留在 PPT 裡！🎯 一月進入關鍵的「營運校準期」 。您的年度方針是否已從高層願景，轉化為團隊具體的行動清單？在 2026 年，領先團隊不再依賴手動追蹤，而是透過 Asana AI 實現個人目標與組織戰略的「深度校準」 。 當 Asana 提供了 80% 的自動化數據，剩下的 20% 則依賴管理者如何應對變革中的「數據斷層」 。 以下是運用 Asana AI 提升計畫落地率的三個關鍵策略： 🔹 目標自動精煉：輸入指令讓 AI 將籠統文字轉化為符合 SMART 原則、具備具體數據的關鍵成果 (KR) 。 🔹 專案智慧拆解：30 秒內產出第一季核心任務骨架，大幅縮短耗時，解決對著空白螢幕發呆的焦慮 。 🔹 營運風險預測：利用 AI 分析各專案進度與資源負載 (Workload)，提早發現戰略項目延遲風險，實現主動預警治理 。 💡 觀點： 計畫是活的 。智慧管理的本質不在於建立永不改變的系統，而在於擁有一套能隨環境進化、卻又不失數據回溯能力的治理體系 。讓 AI 處理海量數據，將寶貴的經驗留給最後 20% 的戰略決策 。 👉 查看實作指南：https://hubs.la/Q042481F0 hashtag #AsanaAI hashtag #OKR hashtag #2026年度計畫 hashtag #專案管理 hashtag #SMART原則 hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #智慧治理 hashtag #領導力 hashtag #數據斷層

item.title:
工作中是不是常常被重複性任務卡住腳步，像是整理郵件、安排會議，或總結大量文件？現在不用再被瑣事綁住時間，交給 Google Workspace Studio 幫你處理吧！
🔍 什麼是 Google ...
item.description: 工作中是不是常常被重複性任務卡住腳步，像是整理郵件、安排會議，或總結大量文件？現在不用再被瑣事綁住時間，交給 Google Workspace Studio 幫你處理吧！ 🔍 什麼是 Google Workspace Studio？ 這是內建於 Google Workspace 的全新平台，不需寫程式就能建立 AI 代理，自動化日常工作流程。由 Google AI 模型 Gemini 3 驅動，不只執行指令，更能理解你的意圖並完成任務。 ✨ 各種自動化實例 • 每天產出未讀郵件摘要 • 主動提醒重要來信 • 會後寄送會議重點與待辦事項 • 建立符合團隊需求的客製化工作流程 所有流程都能串接 Gmail、Google Drive、Docs、Sheets 與 Chat，一站式完成自動化。 🎯 對企業而言，真正的價值不只是節省時間，而是讓團隊從繁瑣工作中解放，把精力投入更關鍵的策略與創新。 👉 閱讀更多 https://hubs.ly/Q042qVd10 hashtag #GoogleWorkspaceStudio hashtag #AIAgent hashtag #Gemini3 hashtag #GoogleWorkspace

item.title: 昨天思想科技 Master Concept 參與了 Google Cloud AI 加速日，特別感謝來到我們攤位交流的每一位客戶！作為 Google Cloud 菁英合作夥伴，我們始終相信，AI 不只...
item.description: 昨天思想科技 Master Concept 參與了 Google Cloud AI 加速日，特別感謝來到我們攤位交流的每一位客戶！作為 Google Cloud 菁英合作夥伴，我們始終相信，AI 不只是工具，而是推動創新、知識成長與生產力全面進化的關鍵力量 ✨ Google AI 建立在最先進的大模型之上，包含 Gemini 3、Nano Banana Pro、Veo 3 以及 Deep Research Agent，持續為企業帶來更強大的智慧能力。 🎨 GenMedia 就像企業的創意工作室，透過 Vertex AI 與 Gemini 技術，整合文字、圖片、影片與代理功能，協助團隊快速產出高品質內容素材。 🏢 Gemini Enterprise 則是進階代理式 AI 平台，讓員工能在安全環境中善用 AI 代理，同時串接 ERP、協作工具與既有企業系統，真正把 AI 帶進日常工作流程。 如果你也正在評估 AI 導入，或想知道企業該從哪一步開始，歡迎和我們聊聊：https://hubs.la/Q0424Lps0 Jennifer Hsiao Bruce Liu 劉仁寧 Kiki Ho Hannah Lo Shaun-En (Sean) Chen Wen Jie Che hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #AI轉型 hashtag #企業數位轉型

item.description: 🚀 50 萬港幣「智」啟學教撥款：Master Concept x Big Bang Academy 一站式方案 【Gemini AI 技術 × 沉浸式科學體驗】 香港教育局 50 萬「智」啟學教撥款如何發揮最大價值？ Master Concept 聯手 Big Bang Academy，為香港中小學部署最強 Google AI 大腦與科學探索課程。 💡 協作三大亮點： 🔹 Gemini Enterprise：師生雙向賦能 由 Master Concept 部署，協助老師秒速備課與簡化行政，同時為學生打造個人化智慧知識庫，引領跨學科的深度探索。 🔹 Big Bang Academy：AI 課程與體驗 提供由 Gemini 驅動的 AI STEAM 體驗日、超級科學家專案課程及教師培訓，全方位提升校園 AI 素養。 🔹 100% 撥款指標對接 輕鬆達成 3 科推行、6 個範例、3+3 分享會及 2 個學生活動，確保撥款順利核銷。 👉 查看 50 萬撥款專屬方案詳情： 🔗https://hubs.la/Q041X06q0 👉 立即聯絡我們，獲取 50 萬撥款申請建議書🔗https://hubs.la/Q041X07l0

item.title: AI isn’t just a buzzword—it’s a total game-changer for Singapore SMEs.🚀 Think about it: What if you ...
item.description: AI isn’t just a buzzword—it’s a total game-changer for Singapore SMEs.🚀 Think about it: What if you could hand over the mundane tasks—like drafting emails and organizing projects—to an AI assistant that lives right inside your workspace? Join us for a 45-minute live webinar where we’ll show you how Gemini in Google Workspace acts as your extra pair of hands to help you scale. 💡 Why should you tune in? - Automate the Mundane: Watch Gemini handle the heavy lifting in Gmail, Docs, and Sheets so you can focus on the big picture. - Spark Innovation: See how Gemini helps you brainstorm fresh marketing ideas, craft customized proposals, and sharpen your business strategy. - Exclusive Perks: Learn about the SME Grant available to help you adopt AI at a fraction of the cost. 📅 Feb 11 (Wed) | 11:00 AM – 11:45 AM 📍 Live on Google Meet Secure your spot now: https://lnkd.in/gDNGMcpf hashtag #GoogleWorkspace hashtag #GeminiAI hashtag #AIforBusiness hashtag #Productivity hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #SingaporeBusiness hashtag #SingaporeSME hashtag #SingaporeGrant hashtag #SMEGrant hashtag #LiveWebinar hashtag #FreeWebinar

item.title:
🛑 Most IT teams don’t struggle because they lack security tools.
They struggle because alerts keep ...
item.description: 🛑 Most IT teams don’t struggle because they lack security tools. They struggle because alerts keep coming—but context and intelligence don’t arrive in time. Building a full SOC sounds like the answer. For many teams, it isn’t. That’s why we created this Google Threat Intelligence & SecOps Evaluation Guide to help modern IT teams rethink security operations without the cost and complexity of building a full SOC. If your team is re-evaluating how to strengthen security with limited resources, this guide is a good place to start 🚀 hashtag #CyberSecurity hashtag #SecOps hashtag #ThreatIntelligence hashtag #GoogleCloudSecurity hashtag #SOC hashtag #ITLeadership

item.title:
🚀 Asana AI 協作新思維：別讓工作流變「碎片化」！
最近刷社群發現一個有趣的比喻，原來 AI 也有「星座」： ♊ GPT 像雙子座：反應快、情緒價值滿滿，但有時會隨口說說。 ♑ Gemi...
item.description:
🚀 Asana AI 協作新思維：別讓工作流變「碎片化」！
最近刷社群發現一個有趣的比喻，原來 AI 也有「星座」： ♊ GPT 像雙子座：反應快、情緒價值滿滿，但有時會隨口說說。 ♑ Gemini 像摩羯座：有理有據、嚴謹，但給人的感覺比較冷冰冰。
你的工作流還在碎片化嗎？隨著 Asana 2025 更新，關鍵在於打造「AI 隊友」SOP： 1️⃣ 分工明確：善用 GPT 發想創意大綱，搭配 Gemini 進行邏輯與事實查核，將 AI 轉化為穩定戰力。 2️⃣ 精準 SEO：關鍵字不只是堆砌，更要深挖「搜尋意圖」。例如：搜尋「步驟」的人想學的是技巧，而非商品清單。 3️⃣ 流程自動化：利用 Asana 將研究、大綱到優化標準化，告別體力活，實現數據驅動決策。
不再被 AI 牽著走，現在就成為高效指揮官！💪 閱讀全文：https://hubs.la/Q040rkQR0
hashtag #Asana hashtag #AI工作流 hashtag #SEO hashtag #內容行銷 hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #市場洞察 hashtag #專案管理 hashtag #2025趨勢

item.title: 🎉 We’re thrilled to highlight our collaboration with hashtag #Saviynt and hashtag #JUCC, where we ...
item.description: 🎉 We’re thrilled to highlight our collaboration with hashtag #Saviynt and hashtag #JUCC, where we joined forces to provide universities with critical insights into modern identity security 🔐. At Master Concept, we are committed to supporting higher education institutions on their journey to modernize and strengthen their security systems. 🎤 Our Head of Public Sector, Johnathan Ip, and Cybersecurity Consultant, Kitty Kwok, shared deep insights on implementing Identity and Access Management (IAM) with complete lifecycle management. A key takeaway was how our IAM expertise—particularly with hashtag #Okta—seamlessly integrates with advanced Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) solutions like Saviynt. This powerful combination is essential for managing today’s complex hybrid environments 🌐. 🤝 Together, we’re paving the way for universities to enhance their security posture and adapt confidently to the evolving digital landscape. A big thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to this meaningful discussion! hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #IAM hashtag #IGA
item.content:encoded: 🎉 We’re thrilled to highlight our collaboration with hashtag #Saviynt and hashtag #JUCC, where we joined forces to provide universities with critical insights into modern identity security 🔐. At Master Concept, we are committed to supporting higher education institutions on their journey to modernize and strengthen their security systems. 🎤 Our Head of Public Sector, Johnathan Ip, and Cybersecurity Consultant, Kitty Kwok, shared deep insights on implementing Identity and Access Management (IAM) with complete lifecycle management. A key takeaway was how our IAM expertise—particularly with hashtag #Okta—seamlessly integrates with advanced Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) solutions like Saviynt. This powerful combination is essential for managing today’s complex hybrid environments 🌐. 🤝 Together, we’re paving the way for universities to enhance their security posture and adapt confidently to the evolving digital landscape. A big thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to this meaningful discussion! hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #IAM hashtag #IGA

item.description: 2 Days. 1 Fireside Chat. Countless “How can Gemini help my business?” conversations. 💡 A huge thank you to SCCCI and Meng Hau Foo for putting together an epic two-day SCCCI Tech Symposium! ⚡️ The energy was incredible—from showcasing Gemini’s latest magic at our booth to diving deep into real-world Gen AI use cases during our fireside chat. It was awesome meeting so many of you to talk about grants and how our solutions can boost your productivity. 🚀 Missed us? item.title:
【領航 AI 教育新時代 ☁️ Google Cloud Education Summit Hong Kong】
AI 正在以前所未有的速度重塑教學模式。身為教育者，我們如何帶領學生在 AI 浪潮中...
item.description: 【領航 AI 教育新時代 ☁️ Google Cloud Education Summit Hong Kong】 AI 正在以前所未有的速度重塑教學模式。身為教育者，我們如何帶領學生在 AI 浪潮中保持競爭力？ 誠邀各位校長及老師參與 1 月 31 日於會展舉行的 Google Cloud Education Summit。這不只是一場科技講座，更是香港教育領袖交流 AI 應用實踐的絕佳平台。 ⭐ 活動重點： 📕 上午場：「Gemini Academy 學生工作坊：善用 Gemini 變革教育與學習」 (學生及老師時段）-- 讓學生親手接觸 Google 最新的 AI 技術，學習如何將 AI 轉化為解決問題、激發創意的利器（所有參與學生將於活動完結後獲發參與證書 🎓）。 📗 下午場：「Google Cloud Education Summit Hong Kong」（教育工作者時段）-- 歡迎各學校校長及老師參加。活動為教育工作者提供度身定制的體驗，多位香港教育領袖分享AI 如何重塑教學未來及真實應用案例。 🏫 活動詳情： 🗓 日期： 2026年 1 月 31 日（星期六） 📍地點： 香港會議展覽中心（第二期）2 樓 N201 會議室 ⏳ 名額有限，請於 1 月 23 日前完成登記： 🔗上午場（學生及老師）：https://hubs.la/Q03_Ft9w0 🔗 下午場（教育工作者）：https://hubs.la/Q03_FtvT0 讓我們一起引領教育未來，現場見！ hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #Gemini hashtag #GoogleCloudPartner hashtag #EdTech hashtag #GeminiAcademy hashtag #香港教育

item.title:
【Webinar 線上研討會 踴躍報名中】
AI 不再只是實驗性工具，而是正在重塑企業競爭力的關鍵引擎。 隨著 Gemini 3 正式登場，企業該如何讓 AI 真正走進業務、行銷與日常營運流程，而不...
item.description: 【Webinar 線上研討會 踴躍報名中】 AI 不再只是實驗性工具，而是正在重塑企業競爭力的關鍵引擎。 隨著 Gemini 3 正式登場，企業該如何讓 AI 真正走進業務、行銷與日常營運流程，而不只是停留在概念與測試階段？ 在這場線上研討會中，Master Concept 思想科技將結合第一線實務經驗，帶你深入了解 Gemini 3 在企業應用中的核心價值，協助團隊加速落地、創造實際成效： 🔹 業務強化 🔹 行銷加速 🔹 營運優化 如果你正在思考企業 AI 轉型的下一步，或希望更具體了解 Gemini 3 如何為組織帶來可衡量的價值，這場 webinar 值得你預留時間參加。也歡迎轉發給對 AI 與數位轉型有興趣的夥伴，一起交流學習。 【Gemini 3：企業 AI 轉型的關鍵引擎】 🗓️ 2026 年 1 月 29 日（四） ⏱️ 14:00 – 15:00（13:50 開放進入） 👉 立即報名：https://hubs.la/Q03_qQQ80 hashtag #GoogleWorkspace hashtag #Gemini3 hashtag #NanoBananaPro hashtag #NotebookLM

item.title:
Looking forward to the official launch tomorrow! 🚀
I am very much excited to be participating and s...
item.description: Looking forward to the official launch tomorrow! 🚀 I am very much excited to be participating and sharing at this key launch event. To my fellow Filipinos attending, I hope we can all connect there! Let's meet up and exchange insights after the sessions. --- Abangan ang opisyal na launch bukas! 🚀 Lubos akong nagagalak na makalahok at makapagbahagi sa mahalagang launch event na ito. Isang magandang pagkakataon ito para makapag-ambag, matuto, at makabuo ng makabuluhang koneksyon. Sa aking mga kapwa Pilipinong dadalo, sana ay magkita-kita tayo doon! item.title: Ever had a driver circle the building three times just to find the exact right spot? 🚗🌀 We call it t...
item.description: Ever had a driver circle the building three times just to find the exact right spot? 🚗🌀 We call it the "Last Meter" challenge, and it’s where many delivery and ride-sharing operations lose their hard-earned efficiency. Our blog explores how Google Maps Platform’s Geocoding APIs—like Address Descriptors and Building Outlines and Entrances—are putting an end to those dreaded "Where are you?" customer texts. Why it matters: 📍 Instant driver orientation using landmarks and surrounding areas. 📍 Direct navigation to specific pickup/dropoff points or driveways. 📍 Fewer failed deliveries and happier customers. Precision isn't just about coordinates anymore; it's about context. ✨ 🔗 Read more on our blog: https://lnkd.in/g4-6VvGP hashtag #GoogleMaps hashtag #GoogleMapsPlatform hashtag #Geocoding hashtag #MapsAPI hashtag #LastMile hashtag #Mobility hashtag #OperationalEfficiency hashtag #Logistics hashtag #RideSharing hashtag #DeliveryService hashtag #CustomerExperience

item.title:
How AI Supports Cloud Security Operations — A Hands-on Cloud Security Workshop
As AI accelerates bo...
item.description: How AI Supports Cloud Security Operations — A Hands-on Cloud Security Workshop As AI accelerates both attacks and defenses, cloud security operations are becoming faster, more complex — and more dependent on good decisions. In this hands-on workshop, we’ll explore how AI actually supports cloud security operations in practice, using hashtag #GoogleCloudSecurity and AI tools like hashtag #Gemini as examples. Rather than focusing on features, this session walks through how AI can help security teams: - Access and analyze threat intelligence and security signals - Support investigation and reasoning in security operations - Turn insights into practical next steps - Improve speed and clarity — without removing human judgment This is a guided, hands-on walkthrough of how AI fits into real-world cloud security workflows, and where humans remain firmly in control. 🧑‍💻 Hands-on | Cloud Security Operations | AI-assisted decision-making 💻 Participants need to bring their laptops and follow along. 📍 Master Concept Hong Kong Solution Day | AI & U 🕒 2026.01.08 (Thu.) 👉 Full Agenda and Register here: https://lnkd.in/gaPGzpir hashtag #CloudSecurity hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #SecOps hashtag #AI hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #HandsOnWorkshop

item.description: 🚀 你的創意產速，就是你的競爭力！ AI 生圖不再只是玩玩而已，Google 全新影像模型 Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image) 已經將 AI 影像推向「企業級」應用高度！ 為什麼企業該關注這項技術？ 🌍 文字精準控制：在產品素材中嵌入多國語言，全球行銷在地化快狠準。 🔍 精準資訊圖表：結合 Google 搜尋，自動生成具備正確事實的專業圖解。 🎨 品牌一致性：同時參考 14 張圖片，確保 Logo、代言人、風格永不走樣。 📸 4K 攝影棚等級：隨意調整光影、焦距與解析度，省下高額後製與攝影成本。 身為 Google Cloud 菁英合作夥伴，思想科技 Master Concept 致力於協助企業將 AI 潛力轉化為實質利潤。 ➣ 閱讀完整文章： https://hubs.la/Q03YqShJ0 ➢ 聯絡思想科技：https://hubs.la/Q03YqRZD0 hashtag #GoogleAI hashtag #NanoBananaPro hashtag #Gemini hashtag #Gemini3ProImage hashtag #GenAI

item.title:
🛠️ Cloudflare Outage Review: Quick Lessons in Infrastructure Resilience
As a Tier 1 (T1) partner wi...
item.description: 🛠️ Cloudflare Outage Review: Quick Lessons in Infrastructure Resilience As a Tier 1 (T1) partner with Cloudflare, we at Master Concept have been working closely with their teams, providing us with a deep understanding of operational matters and receiving numerous updates regarding recent incidents. Leveraging this insight, here is a quick summary of the key findings from Cloudflare’s official Root Cause Analysis (RAC) reports: - December 5, 2025 Outage: A critical bug in an older proxy system (FL1) was triggered by an emergency configuration change deployed to mitigate the "React2Shell" vulnerability. This configuration interaction caused a hard-fail across affected services. 🔗 RAC Link: https://lnkd.in/gpqkhJzC - November 18, 2025 Outage: A bug in the Bot Management feature file generation created an excessively large configuration file. This oversized file led to repeated crashes in the software module responsible for traffic processing, causing an extended multi-hour outage. 🔗 RAC Link: https://lnkd.in/gj4XDaZA [Key Takeaway] The resilience provided by robust CDN/WAF setups kept some of our customers unimpacted. This focus on protection aligns with the HK Critical Infrastructure Bill, a topic Master Concept details in our comprehensive e-book: https://lnkd.in/gzp59V2w Got questions? Inquire us via here: https://lnkd.in/gvKvAt7T and we are here to help! hashtag #Cloudflare hashtag #SRE hashtag #Infrastructure hashtag #DevOps hashtag #RootCauseAnalysis hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKCriticalInfrastructure
item.content:encoded: 🛠️ Cloudflare Outage Review: Quick Lessons in Infrastructure Resilience As a Tier 1 (T1) partner with Cloudflare, we at Master Concept have been working closely with their teams, providing us with a deep understanding of operational matters and receiving numerous updates regarding recent incidents. Leveraging this insight, here is a quick summary of the key findings from Cloudflare’s official Root Cause Analysis (RAC) reports: - December 5, 2025 Outage: A critical bug in an older proxy system (FL1) was triggered by an emergency configuration change deployed to mitigate the "React2Shell" vulnerability. This configuration interaction caused a hard-fail across affected services. 🔗 RAC Link: https://lnkd.in/gpqkhJzC - November 18, 2025 Outage: A bug in the Bot Management feature file generation created an excessively large configuration file. This oversized file led to repeated crashes in the software module responsible for traffic processing, causing an extended multi-hour outage. 🔗 RAC Link: https://lnkd.in/gj4XDaZA [Key Takeaway] The resilience provided by robust CDN/WAF setups kept some of our customers unimpacted. This focus on protection aligns with the HK Critical Infrastructure Bill, a topic Master Concept details in our comprehensive e-book: https://lnkd.in/gzp59V2w Got questions? Inquire us via here: https://lnkd.in/gvKvAt7T and we are here to help! hashtag #Cloudflare hashtag #SRE hashtag #Infrastructure hashtag #DevOps hashtag #RootCauseAnalysis hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKCriticalInfrastructure

item.description:
🤯 ISO 27001 稽核又來了？您是否也為了準備成堆的佐證資料而壓力山大？
別再讓年度稽核搞得團隊人仰馬翻！🔥 與其被動地應對混亂，不如用 Asana 將稽核準備，轉變為主動、系統化的「日常」！
Asana 不僅是專案管理工具，更是您應對資安稽核的強力後盾。它能幫助您： 🗂️ 集中管理文件：將所有稽核相關紀錄與文件，系統化地整合在同一平台。 🎯 明確責任歸屬：清楚指派每項控制措施的負責人，留下清晰的數位軌跡。 ⚙️ 實現持續合規：透過自動化流程，將資安要求融入日常工作，讓稽核準備成為常態。

item.title: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic."...
item.description: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic." It was "AI Visibility." Just wrapped up an incredible executive session with Amplitude. The energy in the room was electric, but the post-event data tells the real story. We surveyed our guests—leaders from Finance, Retail, and Tech—on their #1 priority for 2026. The overwhelming winner? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The realization is hitting hard: ❌ Ranking #1 on Google doesn't matter if ChatGPT answers the user's question without a click. ✅ The new battleground is ensuring your brand is "visible" and "recommended" by AI agents. A huge thank you to everyone who joined the conversation. The shift from "Search" to "Answer" is here, and today proved that Hong Kong's top enterprises are ready to tackle it. Missed the session? We are opening up 5 more slots for the Custom AI Visibility Audit (the same one our guests received). Comment "VISIBILITY" below, and I’ll DM you the details. James B. Lindsay Baljin S. Amelia Xu Ai Nico Ng hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #GEO hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #DataAnalytics

item.title: Yesterday's Google Workspace x JumpCloud event was pure synergy! 🚀 We dove deep into building a more...
item.description: Yesterday's Google Workspace x JumpCloud event was pure synergy! 🚀 We dove deep into building a more productive and secure solution for today's hybrid workforce. We learned that boosting efficiency with integrated AI like Gemini in Workspace doesn't mean sacrificing security.🛡️ Google Workspace Security together with JumpCloud is a powerful pairing to secure your enterprise data and centralize identity and device controls for everything, ensuring uncompromised protection against threats like data leakage and compromised credentials. A huge shout-out to our incredible speakers for sharing their expertise and demos: Nicholas Effendi, Jeremy N., and Jovi Lee. 🎤 Also big thanks to the wonderful support from the teams from Google Linsey Linh Dang Anisha Rakyan and JumpCloud Ivan Chin Gautham Anbalagan. 🙌 Last but not least, thank you to all the attendees for making it such a vibrant and insightful event! hashtag #GoogleWorkspace hashtag #Gemini hashtag #AI hashtag #CloudSecurity hashtag #JumpCloud hashtag #IDAM hashtag #MDM hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #ZeroTrust

item.title:
The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war?
It’s the nightmare scena...
item.description: The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war? It’s the nightmare scenario for every digital leader: You rank #1 on Google, but your traffic is flat. Why? Because the user never clicked. They got their answer from an AI summary and moved on. The data confirms the shift: 📉 Zero-click searches are skyrocketing. 📉 CTRs are plummeting as AI overviews take over. 📉 80% of consumers (Bain & Co) no longer rely solely on traditional search to learn about brands. If a potential client asks ChatGPT or Claude about your solution, do you know what it says? Is it recommending you? Or your competitor? Until now, this was a blind spot. Not anymore. Join us on Dec 3 for an exclusive executive luncheon with Amplitude. We are unveiling the new AI Visibility framework—the first tool designed to measure your standing in the age of LLMs. Exclusive for attendees: We will be generating a Custom AI Visibility Report for your brand, showing you exactly how you rank in AI-generated answers today. Stop guessing. Start measuring. 👉 Request your seat here (Private Dining): https://hubs.la/Q03W0WdJ0 Event details in comment. hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AEO hashtag #AIAnalytics hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingStrategy

item.title:
🎉 Announcing the AI Agents Lab Tour! Shanghai, Hong Kong, Beijing & Taipei.
The age of AI Agents is...
item.description: 🎉 Announcing the AI Agents Lab Tour! Shanghai, Hong Kong, Beijing & Taipei. The age of AI Agents is here, and we're bringing the revolution to you! Master Concept and Google Cloud are launching the "Build your AI Agents" Lab across four cities. This is your chance to move beyond theory and get hands-on experience building intelligent agents that automate workflows and execute complex decisions. Find your city and register below: 📍 Shanghai | Oct 28 Register Here: https://hubs.la/Q03PrbBV0 📍 Hong Kong | Oct 30 Register Here: https://hubs.la/Q03PrbpM0 📍 Beijing | Nov 19 Save the date! Registration opens soon. 📍 Taipei | Nov 28 Register Here: https://lnkd.in/eK6rrPc3 This is a BYOL (Bring Your Own Laptop) event, so prepare to dive in and explore the infinite possibilities of AI Agents. hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #GoogleCloudPartner hashtag #AiAgent hashtag #Gemini hashtag #Developer hashtag #TechEvent
